text: - J. Subcontractor shall defend, indemnify and save harmless Contractor and Owner from any and all laborer's, material men's and mechanic's liens upon the Project and the property and premises on which the Subcontractor Work is being performed that arise out  of  the  sublet  work,  and  shall  keep  such  property  and  improvements  free  and  clear  of  all  liens,  claims  and  encumbrances arising out of the performance of this Subcontract, and Subcontractor shall defend, indemnify and save harmless Contractor and its surety from any such liens or claims or causes of action asserted against Contractor's surety bonds issued in connection with the Project, if any. Subcontractor shall defend, indemnify and save harmless Contractor and Owner from any claims or suits for infringement or violation of patents or patent rights by Subcontractor. If a lien is filed on the Project by one of Subcontractor's suppliers or sub-subcontractors, Subcontractor shall, within seven (7) days notice from Contractor, cause the lien to be removed or bonded  around  If  Subcontractor  fails  to  do  any  of  the  foregoing,  Contractor  may  deduct  from  sums  then  or  thereafter  due
